questionHtml:
Which equilibrium constant corresponds to the spontaneous reaction with the most negative value of ΔG⦵?

A.  4.9 × 10−3

B.  8.2 × 10−3

C.  4.9 × 102

D.  8.2 × 102

meta.title: Which equilibrium constant corresponds to the spontaneous reaction with the most negative value of ΔG⦵? A. 4.9 × 10−3 B. 8.2 × 10−3 C. 4.9 × 102 D. 8.2 × 102
